title: bus.rs: RedisClient::publish opens a new async connection on every call
description: RedisClient::publish() calls self.client.get_multiplexed_async_connection().await on every publish call. On a busy relay each outbound message causes a TCP handshake to the Redis server. The redis crate already supports a multiplexed connection that can be cheaply cloned and reused. RedisClient should hold a single Arc<MultiplexedConnection> created at startup rather than opening a new connection per publish.
